char_1.appearance_summary: a young boy around six years old with short black hair, round face, lean child frame, wearing simple cloth clothes and leather boots
char_1.name: 林雷

char_2.appearance_summary: young blond boy around six years old, large curious eyes, small frame, wearing simple cloth training clothes
char_2.name: 哈德利

char_3.appearance_summary: middle-aged man with broad shoulders and defined muscles, short black hair with streaks of gray, stern eyes, numerous scars on his bare torso from blades and swords
char_3.name: 希尔曼

char_4.appearance_summary: young adult male instructor, athletic build, short brown hair, wearing simple trainer's clothes, friendly expression
char_4.name: 罗瑞

char_5.appearance_summary: young adult male instructor, fit build, serious expression, wearing trainer's clothes, observing children
char_5.name: 罗杰

char_6.appearance_summary: 希尔曼、罗瑞、罗杰，本集配角
char_6.name: 希尔曼、罗瑞、罗杰

loc_1.name: 乌山镇训练场
loc_1.description: open outdoor training ground surrounded by wooden fences and distant mountains, early morning light casting soft golden hues, rows of children standing in formation on grassy earth

3.summary: 希尔曼通过展示力量激发孩童训练热情，林雷在首次锻炼中展现出远超同龄人的毅力与资质。

99.summary: 林雷在学院中偶遇希尔曼，对方挑衅其实力，两人言语交锋间埋下后续冲突伏笔。

relationships.note: 希尔曼注意到林雷并对其表现赞赏，初步建立师徒关注关系
言语冲突，对立关系初现

plot_events.summary: 希尔曼展示力量震慑全场，激励孩童训练
林雷在首次训练中坚持到最后梯队，引起教官注意
希尔曼对林雷表现出认可与期待，埋下培养伏笔
